en: A rain-burned recovery site with a weak uplink and a short scavenger loop.
zh: 一处被酸雨灼烧的回收点，链路微弱，只能维持短循环拾荒。

en: Rain is breaking the satellite uplink. Keep the scavenger on a short loop until we recover enough scrap.
zh: 酸雨正在撕裂卫星链路。先让拾荒机器人维持短循环，直到回收足够的废铁。

en: The script on the left is your tape. Press play or single-frame after this briefing; the system will compile it on demand.
zh: 左侧脚本就是你的纸带。简报结束后点击播放或快进一帧，系统会按需编译。

en: Recover the nearby scrap, upgrade tape capacity, then we can route you toward the next unlocked site.
zh: 回收附近废铁，升级纸带容量，然后我们就能把路线指向下一个已解锁地点。
